revision.comment: 「一覧」を除去、マークアップ修正（[[H:LIST]]、[[Help‐ノート:箇条書き#定義の箇条書きと箇条書きの複合について]]）
revision.text:
'''小野神社'''（おのじんじゃ）は、「小野」を社名に持つ神社。多くは古代豪族・[[小野氏]]に関係する。
== 関東地方 == * [[武蔵国]][[多摩郡]]の[[式内社]]としての小野神社 ** [[小野神社 (多摩市)|小野神社]] （[[東京都]][[多摩市]]） - 式内社[[論社]]、[[武蔵国]][[一宮]]。古くは祭神を[[天押帯日子命]]（小野氏祖）とした<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref>。 ** [[小野神社 (東京都府中市)|小野神社]] （東京都[[府中市 (東京都)|府中市]]） - 式内社論社。 * [[小野神社 (町田市)|小野神社]] （東京都[[町田市]]小野路町） - [[小野篁]]を祀る。 * [[小野神社 (厚木市)|小野神社]] （[[神奈川県]][[厚木市]]） - [[相模国]][[愛甲郡]]の式内社。
== 中部地方 == * [[小野神社・矢彦神社|小野神社]] （[[長野県]][[塩尻市]]） - [[信濃国]][[二宮]]。⇒[[小野神社・矢彦神社]]を参照。
== 近畿地方 == * [[近江国]][[滋賀郡]]の[[名神大社]]としての小野神社 ** [[小野神社 (大津市)|小野神社]] （[[滋賀県]][[大津市]]小野） - [[論社]]。祭神：[[天足彦国押人命]]（小野氏祖神） ** [[天皇神社|小野天皇神社]] （滋賀県大津市小野） - [[論社]]。 * 小野神社 （滋賀県[[高島市]]） - [[市杵島神社 (高島市)|市杵島神社]]境内社。 * 小野神社 （[[京都府]][[京都市]][[左京区]]） - [[崇導神社]]境内社。祭神：[[小野妹子]]・[[小野毛人|毛人]]
== 中国地方 == * [[小野神社 (益田市)|小野神社]] （[[島根県]][[益田市]]） * [[小野神社 (広島県府中市)|小野神社]] （[[広島県]][[府中市 (広島県)|府中市]]）
== 四国地方 == * [[小野神社 (南国市)|小野神社]] （[[高知県]][[南国市]]） - 式内社。祭神：[[天足彦国押人命]]
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} <references/>
{{デフォルトソート:おのしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing Japanese shrine disambiguation articles
revision.text:
'''小野神社'''（おのじんじゃ）は、「小野」を社名に持つ神社。多くは古代豪族・[[小野氏]]に関係する。
== 関東地方 == * [[武蔵国]][[多摩郡]]の[[式内社]]としての小野神社 ** [[小野神社 (多摩市)|小野神社]] （[[東京都]][[多摩市]]） - 式内社[[論社]]、[[武蔵国]][[一宮]]。古くは祭神を[[天押帯日子命]]（小野氏祖）とした<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref>。 ** [[小野神社 (東京都府中市)|小野神社]] （東京都[[府中市 (東京都)|府中市]]） - 式内社論社。 * [[小野神社 (町田市)|小野神社]] （東京都[[町田市]]小野路町） - [[小野篁]]を祀る。 * [[小野神社 (厚木市)|小野神社]] （[[神奈川県]][[厚木市]]） - [[相模国]][[愛甲郡]]の式内社。
== 中部地方 == * [[小野神社・矢彦神社|小野神社]] （[[長野県]][[塩尻市]]） - [[信濃国]][[二宮]]。⇒[[小野神社・矢彦神社]]を参照。
== 近畿地方 == * [[近江国]][[滋賀郡]]の[[名神大社]]としての小野神社 ** [[小野神社 (大津市)|小野神社]] （[[滋賀県]][[大津市]]小野） - [[論社]]。祭神：[[天足彦国押人命]]（小野氏祖神） ** [[天皇神社|小野天皇神社]] （滋賀県大津市小野） - [[論社]]。 * 小野神社 （滋賀県[[高島市]]） - [[市杵島神社 (高島市)|市杵島神社]]境内社。 * 小野神社 （[[京都府]][[京都市]][[左京区]]） - [[崇導神社]]境内社。祭神：[[小野妹子]]・[[小野毛人|毛人]]
== 中国地方 == * [[小野神社 (益田市)|小野神社]] （[[島根県]][[益田市]]） * [[小野神社 (広島県府中市)|小野神社]] （[[広島県]][[府中市 (広島県)|府中市]]）
== 四国地方 == * [[小野神社 (南国市)|小野神社]] （[[高知県]][[南国市]]） - 式内社。祭神：[[天足彦国押人命]]
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} <references/>
{{デフォルトソート:おのしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

== 中部地方 == * [[小野神社・矢彦神社|小野神社]] （[[長野県]][[塩尻市]]） - [[信濃国]][[二宮]]。⇒[[小野神社・矢彦神社]]を参照。
== 近畿地方 == * [[近江国]][[滋賀郡]]の[[名神大社]]としての小野神社 ** [[小野神社 (大津市)|小野神社]] （[[滋賀県]][[大津市]]小野） - [[論社]]。祭神：[[天足彦国押人命]]（小野氏祖神） ** [[天皇神社|小野天皇神社]] （滋賀県大津市小野） - [[論社]]。 * 小野神社 （滋賀県[[高島市]]） - [[市杵島神社 (高島市)|市杵島神社]]境内社。 * 小野神社 （[[京都府]][[京都市]][[左京区]]） - [[崇導神社]]境内社。祭神：[[小野妹子]]・[[小野毛人|毛人]]
== 中国地方 == * [[小野神社 (益田市)|小野神社]] （[[島根県]][[益田市]]） * [[小野神社 (広島県府中市)|小野神社]] （[[広島県]][[府中市 (広島県)|府中市]]）
== 四国地方 == * [[小野神社 (南国市)|小野神社]] （[[高知県]][[南国市]]） - 式内社。祭神：[[天足彦国押人命]]
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} <references/>

'''小野神社'''（おのじんじゃ）は、「小野」を社名に持つ神社。多くは古代豪族・[[小野氏]]に関係する。
== 関東地方 == * [[武蔵国]][[多摩郡]]の[[式内社]]としての小野神社 ** [[小野神社 (多摩市)|小野神社]] （[[東京都]][[多摩市]]） - 式内社[[論社]]、[[武蔵国]][[一宮]]。古くは祭神を[[天押帯日子命]]（小野氏祖）とした<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref>。 ** [[小野神社 (東京都府中市)|小野神社]] （東京都[[府中市 (東京都)|府中市]]） - 式内社論社。 * [[小野神社 (町田市)|小野神社]] （東京都[[町田市]]小野路町） - [[小野篁]]を祀る。 * [[小野神社 (厚木市)|小野神社]] （[[神奈川県]][[厚木市]]） - [[相模国]][[愛甲郡]]の式内社。
== 中部地方 == * [[小野神社・矢彦神社|小野神社]] （[[長野県]][[塩尻市]]） - [[信濃国]][[二宮]]。⇒[[小野神社・矢彦神社]]を参照。
== 近畿地方 == * [[近江国]][[滋賀郡]]の[[名神大社]]としての小野神社 ** [[小野神社 (大津市)|小野神社]] （[[滋賀県]][[大津市]]小野） - [[論社]]。祭神：[[天足彦国押人命]]（小野氏祖神） ** [[天皇神社|小野天皇神社]] （滋賀県大津市小野） - [[論社]]。 * 小野神社 （滋賀県[[高島市]]） - [[市杵島神社 (高島市)|市杵島神社]]境内社。 * 小野神社 （[[京都府]][[京都市]][[左京区]]） - [[崇導神社]]境内社。祭神：[[小野妹子]]・[[小野毛人|毛人]]
== 中国地方 == * [[小野神社 (益田市)|小野神社]] （[[島根県]][[益田市]]） * [[小野神社 (広島県府中市)|小野神社]] （[[広島県]][[府中市 (広島県)|府中市]]）
== 四国地方 == * [[小野神社 (南国市)|小野神社]] （[[高知県]][[南国市]]） - 式内社。祭神：[[天足彦国押人命]]
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} <references/>

== 近畿地方 == * [[近江国]][[滋賀郡]]の[[名神大社]]としての小野神社 ** [[小野神社 (大津市)|小野神社]] （[[滋賀県]][[大津市]]小野） - [[論社]]。祭神：[[天足彦国押人命]]（小野氏祖神） ** [[天皇神社|小野天皇神社]] （滋賀県大津市小野） - [[論社]]。 * 小野神社 （滋賀県[[高島市]]） - [[市杵島神社 (高島市)|市杵島神社]]境内社。 * 小野神社 （[[京都府]][[京都市]][[左京区]]） - [[崇導神社]]境内社。祭神：[[小野妹子]]・[[小野毛人|毛人]]
== 中国地方 == * [[小野神社 (益田市)|小野神社]] （[[島根県]][[益田市]]） * [[小野神社 (広島県府中市)|小野神社]] （[[広島県]][[府中市 (広島県)|府中市]]）
== 四国地方 == * [[小野神社 (南国市)|小野神社]] （[[高知県]][[南国市]]） - 式内社。祭神：[[天足彦国押人命]]
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} <references/>

revision.text:
'''小野神社'''（おのじんじゃ）は、「小野」を社名に持つ神社。多くは古代豪族・[[小野氏]]に関係する。
== 関東地方 == * [[武蔵国]][[多摩郡]]の[[式内社]]としての小野神社 ** [[小野神社 (多摩市)|小野神社]] （[[東京都]][[多摩市]]） - 式内社[[論社]]、[[武蔵国]][[一宮]]。古くは祭神を[[天押帯日子命]]（小野氏祖）とした<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref>。 ** [[小野神社 (東京都府中市)|小野神社]] （東京都[[府中市 (東京都)|府中市]]） - 式内社論社。 * [[小野神社 (町田市)|小野神社]] （東京都[[町田市]]小野路町） - [[小野篁]]を祀る。 * [[小野神社 (厚木市)|小野神社]] （[[神奈川県]][[厚木市]]） - [[相模国]][[愛甲郡]]の式内社。
== 中部地方 == * [[小野神社・矢彦神社|小野神社]] （[[長野県]][[塩尻市]]） - [[信濃国]][[二宮]]。⇒[[小野神社・矢彦神社]]を参照。
== 近畿地方 == * [[近江国]][[滋賀郡]]の[[名神大社]]としての小野神社 ** [[小野神社 (大津市)|小野神社]] （[[滋賀県]][[大津市]]小野） - [[論社]]。祭神：[[天足彦国押人命]]（小野氏祖神） ** [[天皇神社|小野天皇神社]] （滋賀県大津市小野） - [[論社]]。 * 小野神社 （滋賀県[[高島市]]） - [[市杵島神社 (高島市)|市杵島神社]]境内社。 * 小野神社 （[[京都府]][[京都市]][[左京区]]） - [[崇導神社]]境内社。祭神：[[小野妹子]]・[[小野毛人|毛人]]
== 中国地方 == * [[小野神社 (益田市)|小野神社]] （[[島根県]][[益田市]]） * [[小野神社 (広島県府中市)|小野神社]] （[[広島県]][[府中市 (広島県)|府中市]]）
== 四国地方 == * [[小野神社 (南国市)|小野神社]] （[[高知県]][[南国市]]） - 式内社。祭神：[[天足彦国押人命]]
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} <references/>

'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as Shikinaisha of {{ill|Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国}} and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Tama City)|ja|小野神社 (多摩市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Tama City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Tama City|ja|多摩市}}) – A Shikinaisha and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (東京都)}}) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida City|ja|町田市}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|ja|小野篁}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Atsugi City|ja|厚木市}}) – The Shikinaisha of {{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国}} and {{ill|Aikō District|ja|愛甲郡}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, {{ill|Shiojiri City|ja|塩尻市}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|ja|信濃国}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|ja|近江国}} and {{ill|Shiga District|ja|滋賀郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima City|ja|高島市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)}}. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Sakyō Ward|ja|左京区}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|ja|小野妹子}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県}}, {{ill|Masuda City|ja|益田市}}) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (広島県)}})
== Shikoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)}} ({{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}, {{ill|Minokuni City|ja|南国市}}) – A Shikinaisha. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命}}.
== Footnotes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} <references/>

'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as Shikinaisha of {{ill|Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国}} and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Tama City)|ja|小野神社 (多摩市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Tama City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Tama City|ja|多摩市}}) – A Shikinaisha and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (東京都)}}) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida City|ja|町田市}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|ja|小野篁}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Atsugi City|ja|厚木市}}) – The Shikinaisha of {{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国}} and {{ill|Aikō District|ja|愛甲郡}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, {{ill|Shiojiri City|ja|塩尻市}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|ja|信濃国}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|ja|近江国}} and {{ill|Shiga District|ja|滋賀郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima City|ja|高島市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)}}. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Sakyō Ward|ja|左京区}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|ja|小野妹子}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県}}, {{ill|Masuda City|ja|益田市}}) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (広島県)}})
== Shikoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)}} ({{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}, {{ill|Minokuni City|ja|南国市}}) – A Shikinaisha. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命}}.

'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as Shikinaisha of {{ill|Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国}} and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Tama City)|ja|小野神社 (多摩市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Tama City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Tama City|ja|多摩市}}) – A Shikinaisha and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (東京都)}}) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida City|ja|町田市}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|ja|小野篁}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Atsugi City|ja|厚木市}}) – The Shikinaisha of {{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国}} and {{ill|Aikō District|ja|愛甲郡}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, {{ill|Shiojiri City|ja|塩尻市}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|ja|信濃国}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|ja|近江国}} and {{ill|Shiga District|ja|滋賀郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima City|ja|高島市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)}}. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Sakyō Ward|ja|左京区}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|ja|小野妹子}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県}}, {{ill|Masuda City|ja|益田市}}) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (広島県)}})
== Shikoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)}} ({{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}, {{ill|Minokuni City|ja|南国市}}) – A Shikinaisha. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi}}.
== Footnotes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} <references/>

'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as Shikinaisha of {{ill|Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国}} and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Tama City)|ja|小野神社 (多摩市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Tama City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Tama City|ja|多摩市}}) – A Shikinaisha and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (東京都)}}) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida City|ja|町田市}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|ja|小野篁}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Atsugi City|ja|厚木市}}) – The Shikinaisha of {{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国}} and {{ill|Aikō District|ja|愛甲郡}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, {{ill|Shiojiri City|ja|塩尻市}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|ja|信濃国}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|ja|近江国}} and {{ill|Shiga District|ja|滋賀郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima City|ja|高島市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)}}. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Sakyō Ward|ja|左京区}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|ja|小野妹子}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県}}, {{ill|Masuda City|ja|益田市}}) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (広島県)}})

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)
revision.text:
'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as Shikinaisha of {{ill|Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国}} and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Tama City)|ja|小野神社 (多摩市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Tama City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Tama City|ja|多摩市}}) – A Shikinaisha and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (東京都)}}) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida City|ja|町田市}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|ja|小野篁}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Atsugi City|ja|厚木市}}) – The Shikinaisha of {{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国}} and {{ill|Aikō District|ja|愛甲郡}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, {{ill|Shiojiri City|ja|塩尻市}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|ja|信濃国}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|ja|近江国}} and {{ill|Shiga District|ja|滋賀郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima City|ja|高島市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)}}. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Sakyō Ward|ja|左京区}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|ja|小野妹子}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県}}, {{ill|Masuda City|ja|益田市}}) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (広島県)}})
== Shikoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)}} ({{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}, {{ill|Minokuni City|ja|南国市}}) – A Shikinaisha. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi}}.
== Footnotes ==

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Tier 5]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as Shikinaisha of {{ill|Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国}} and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Tama City)|ja|小野神社 (多摩市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Tama City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Tama City|ja|多摩市}}) – A Shikinaisha and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (東京都)}}) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida City|ja|町田市}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|ja|小野篁}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Atsugi City|ja|厚木市}}) – The Shikinaisha of {{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国}} and {{ill|Aikō District|ja|愛甲郡}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, {{ill|Shiojiri City|ja|塩尻市}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|ja|信濃国}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|ja|近江国}} and {{ill|Shiga District|ja|滋賀郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima City|ja|高島市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)}}. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Sakyō Ward|ja|左京区}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|ja|小野妹子}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県}}, {{ill|Masuda City|ja|益田市}}) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (広島県)}})
== Shikoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)}} ({{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}, {{ill|Minokuni City|ja|南国市}}) – A Shikinaisha. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi}}.
== Footnotes ==

In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|12=draft}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都|12=draft}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (東京都)|12=draft}}) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|12=draft}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida City|ja|町田市|12=draft}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|ja|小野篁|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Atsugi City|ja|厚木市|12=draft}}) – The Shikinaisha of {{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国|12=draft}} and {{ill|Aikō District|ja|愛甲郡|12=draft}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Shiojiri City|ja|塩尻市|12=draft}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|ja|信濃国|12=draft}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=draft}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|ja|近江国|12=draft}} and {{ill|Shiga District|ja|滋賀郡|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市|12=draft}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|12=draft}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社|12=draft}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市|12=draft}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima City|ja|高島市|12=draft}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)|12=draft}}. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakyō Ward|ja|左京区|12=draft}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社|12=draft}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|ja|小野妹子|12=draft}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人|12=draft}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Masuda City|ja|益田市|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (広島県)|12=draft}})

Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|12=draft}}.

In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|12=draft}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都|12=draft}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (東京都)|12=draft}}) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|12=draft}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida City|ja|町田市|12=draft}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|ja|小野篁|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Atsugi City|ja|厚木市|12=draft}}) – The Shikinaisha of {{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国|12=draft}} and {{ill|Aikō District|ja|愛甲郡|12=draft}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Shiojiri City|ja|塩尻市|12=draft}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|ja|信濃国|12=draft}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=draft}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|ja|近江国|12=draft}} and {{ill|Shiga District|ja|滋賀郡|12=draft}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市|12=draft}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|12=draft}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社|12=draft}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市|12=draft}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima City|ja|高島市|12=draft}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)|12=draft}}. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Sakyō Ward|ja|左京区|12=draft}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社|12=draft}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|ja|小野妹子|12=draft}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人|12=draft}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Masuda City|ja|益田市|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (広島県)|12=draft}})
== Shikoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県|12=draft}}, {{ill|Minokuni City|ja|南国市|12=draft}}) – A Shikinaisha. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|12=draft}}.

In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (東京都)}}) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida City|ja|町田市}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|ja|小野篁}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}, {{ill|Atsugi City|ja|厚木市}}) – The Shikinaisha of {{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国}} and {{ill|Aikō District|ja|愛甲郡}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, {{ill|Shiojiri City|ja|塩尻市}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|ja|信濃国}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|ja|近江国}} and {{ill|Shiga District|ja|滋賀郡}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima City|ja|高島市}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)}}. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Sakyō Ward|ja|左京区}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|ja|小野妹子}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県}}, {{ill|Masuda City|ja|益田市}}) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (広島県)}})
== Shikoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)}} ({{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県}}, {{ill|Minokuni City|ja|南国市}}) – A Shikinaisha. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi}}.
== Footnotes ==

'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|qq=draft}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as Shikinaisha in {{ill|Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡|qq=draft}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Tama City)|ja|小野神社 (多摩市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Tama City)|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Tama City|ja|多摩市|qq=draft}}) – A Shikinaisha and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|qq=draft}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Tokyo Prefecture|ja|東京都|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (東京都)|qq=draft}}) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=draft}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida City|ja|町田市|qq=draft}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|ja|小野篁|qq=draft}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Atsugi City|ja|厚木市|qq=draft}}) – The Shikinaisha in {{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Aikō District|ja|愛甲郡|qq=draft}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Shiojiri City|ja|塩尻市|qq=draft}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|ja|信濃国|qq=draft}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|qq=draft}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|ja|近江国|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Shiga District|ja|滋賀郡|qq=draft}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市|qq=draft}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=draft}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社|qq=draft}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu City|ja|大津市|qq=draft}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima City|ja|高島市|qq=draft}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)|qq=draft}}. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Sakyō Ward|ja|左京区|qq=draft}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社|qq=draft}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|ja|小野妹子|qq=draft}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人|qq=draft}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|ja|島根県|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Masuda City|ja|益田市|qq=draft}}) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|ja|広島県|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Fuchū City|ja|府中市 (広島県)|qq=draft}})
== Shikoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|qq=draft}} ({{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|ja|高知県|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Minokuni City|ja|南国市|qq=draft}}) – A Shikinaisha. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|qq=}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=}} ([[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Prefecture]], [[:en:Fuchū, Tokyo|Fuchū City]]) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=}} (located in Onoji-cho, [[:en:Machida, Tokyo|Machida City]], Tokyo) – enshrines [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]]. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=}} ([[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi City]]) – The Shikinaisha in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] and [[:en:Aikō District, Kanagawa|Aikō District]].
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Shiojiri, Nagano|Shiojiri City]]) – Of [[:en:Shinano Province|Shinano Province]], Ninomiya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Tennō Shrine|qq=}} (located in Ono, [[:en:Ōtsu|Ōtsu City]], Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in [[:en:Takashima, Shiga|Takashima City]], Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|qq=}}. * Ono Shrine (in [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]], [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], [[:en:Sakyō-ku, Kyoto|Sakyō Ward]]) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūdō Shrine|qq=}}. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=}} ([[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Prefecture]], [[:en:Fuchū, Tokyo|Fuchū City]]) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=}} (located in Onoji-cho, [[:en:Machida, Tokyo|Machida City]], Tokyo) – enshrines [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]]. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=}} ([[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi City]]) – The Shikinaisha in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] and [[:en:Aikō District, Kanagawa|Aikō District]].

In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=}} ([[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Prefecture]], [[:en:Fuchū, Tokyo|Fuchū City]]) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=}} (located in Onoji-cho, [[:en:Machida, Tokyo|Machida City]], Tokyo) – enshrines [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]]. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=}} ([[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi City]]) – The Shikinaisha in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] and [[:en:Aikō District, Kanagawa|Aikō District]].

'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as Shikinaisha in [[:en:Musashi Province|Musashi Province]] and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tama District|qq=|1=Tama district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430789}} ** [[:en:Ono Shrine|Ono Shrine (Tama City)]] ([[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Prefecture]], [[:en:Tama, Tokyo|Tama City]]) – A Shikinaisha and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命|1=Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443593}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=|1=Ono-jinja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464226}} ([[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Prefecture]], [[:en:Fuchū, Tokyo|Fuchū City]]) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=|1=Ono-jinja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464227}} (located in Onoji-cho, [[:en:Machida, Tokyo|Machida City]], Tokyo) – enshrines [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]]. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=|1=Ono-jinja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17225921}} ([[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi City]]) – The Shikinaisha in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] and [[:en:Aikō District, Kanagawa|Aikō District]].
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Shiojiri, Nagano|Shiojiri City]]) – Of [[:en:Shinano Province|Shinano Province]], Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of [[:en:Ōmi Province|Ōmi Province]] and [[:en:Shiga District, Shiga|Shiga District]] ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|qq=|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} ([[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Ōtsu|Ōtsu City]], Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Tennō Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Ono, [[:en:Ōtsu|Ōtsu City]], Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in [[:en:Takashima, Shiga|Takashima City]], Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * Ono Shrine (in [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]], [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], [[:en:Sakyō-ku, Kyoto|Sakyō Ward]]) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūdō Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 崇道神社|1=Sudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11477104}}. Enshrined deities: [[:en:Ono no Imoko|Ono no Imoko]] and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Keito|qq=|1=Ono no Emishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11034987}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Shimane Prefecture|Shimane Prefecture]], [[:en:Masuda, Shimane|Masuda City]]) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Hiroshima Prefecture|Hiroshima Prefecture]], [[:en:Fuchū, Hiroshima|Fuchū City]])
== Shikoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|qq=|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} ([[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nankoku, Kōchi|Minokuni City]]) – A Shikinaisha. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=}}.
== Footnotes ==

[[Category:Completion tier 5]]
}}

In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命|1=Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443593}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464226}} ([[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Prefecture]], [[:en:Fuchū, Tokyo|Fuchū City]]) – A Shikinaisha Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464227}} (located in Onoji-cho, [[:en:Machida, Tokyo|Machida City]], Tokyo) – enshrines [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]]. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17225921}} ([[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi City]]) – The Shikinaisha in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] and [[:en:Aikō District, Kanagawa|Aikō District]].

'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as goodbye $1 in [[:en:Musashi Province|Musashi Province]] and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tama District|qq=|1=Tama district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430789}} ** [[:en:Ono Shrine|Ono Shrine (Tama City)]] ([[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Prefecture]], [[:en:Tama, Tokyo|Tama City]]) – A goodbye $1 and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命|1=Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443593}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464226}} ([[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Prefecture]], [[:en:Fuchū, Tokyo|Fuchū City]]) – A goodbye $1 Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464227}} (located in Onoji-cho, [[:en:Machida, Tokyo|Machida City]], Tokyo) – enshrines [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]]. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17225921}} ([[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi City]]) – The goodbye $1 in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] and [[:en:Aikō District, Kanagawa|Aikō District]].
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Shiojiri, Nagano|Shiojiri City]]) – Of [[:en:Shinano Province|Shinano Province]], Ninomiya. == Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of [[:en:Ōmi Province|Ōmi Province]] and [[:en:Shiga District, Shiga|Shiga District]] ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|qq=|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} ([[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Ōtsu|Ōtsu City]], Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Tennō Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Ono, [[:en:Ōtsu|Ōtsu City]], Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in [[:en:Takashima, Shiga|Takashima City]], Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * Ono Shrine (in [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]], [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], [[:en:Sakyō-ku, Kyoto|Sakyō Ward]]) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūdō Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 崇道神社|1=Sudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11477104}}. revision.text:
'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as goodbye $1 in [[:en:Musashi Province|Musashi Province]] and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tama District|1=Tama district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430789}} ** [[:en:Ono Shrine|Ono Shrine (Tama City)]] ([[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Prefecture]], [[:en:Tama, Tokyo|Tama City]]) – A goodbye $1 and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命|1=Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443593}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464226}} ([[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Prefecture]], [[:en:Fuchū, Tokyo|Fuchū City]]) – A goodbye $1 Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464227}} (located in Onoji-cho, [[:en:Machida, Tokyo|Machida City]], Tokyo) – enshrines [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]]. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17225921}} ([[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi City]]) – The goodbye $1 in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] and [[:en:Aikō District, Kanagawa|Aikō District]].
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Shiojiri, Nagano|Shiojiri City]]) – Of [[:en:Shinano Province|Shinano Province]], Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of [[:en:Ōmi Province|Ōmi Province]] and [[:en:Shiga District, Shiga|Shiga District]] ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} ([[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Ōtsu|Ōtsu City]], Ono) – Ronsya. revision.text:
'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as goodbye $1 in [[:en:Musashi Province|Musashi Province]] and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tama District|1=Tama district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430789}} ** [[:en:Ono Shrine|Ono Shrine (Tama City)]] ([[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Prefecture]], [[:en:Tama, Tokyo|Tama City]]) – A goodbye $1 and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命|1=Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443593}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464226}} ([[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo Prefecture]], [[:en:Fuchū, Tokyo|Fuchū City]]) – A goodbye $1 Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464227}} (located in Onoji-cho, [[:en:Machida, Tokyo|Machida City]], Tokyo) – enshrines [[:en:Ono no Takamura|Ono no Takamura]]. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17225921}} ([[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Atsugi|Atsugi City]]) – The goodbye $1 in [[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] and [[:en:Aikō District, Kanagawa|Aikō District]].
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Shiojiri, Nagano|Shiojiri City]]) – Of [[:en:Shinano Province|Shinano Province]], Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of [[:en:Ōmi Province|Ōmi Province]] and [[:en:Shiga District, Shiga|Shiga District]] ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} ([[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Ōtsu|Ōtsu City]], Ono) – Ronsya. '''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as goodbye $1 in {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|WD=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province}} and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tama District|1=Tama district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430789}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine|en|Ono Shrine|WD=Q11464224|lt=Ono Shrine (Tama City)}} ({{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Prefecture}}, {{ill|Tama, Tokyo|en|Tama, Tokyo|WD=Q213263|lt=Tama City}}) – A goodbye $1 and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命|1=Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443593}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464226}} ({{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Prefecture}}, {{ill|Fuchū, Tokyo|en|Fuchū, Tokyo|WD=Q208818|lt=Fuchū City}}) – A goodbye $1 Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464227}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida, Tokyo|en|Machida, Tokyo|WD=Q210628|lt=Machida City}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|en|Ono no Takamura|WD=Q1139928|lt=Ono no Takamura}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17225921}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Atsugi|en|Atsugi|WD=Q389711|lt=Atsugi City}}) – The goodbye $1 in {{ill|Sagami Province|en|Sagami Province|WD=Q1053732|lt=Sagami Province}} and {{ill|Aikō District, Kanagawa|en|Aikō District, Kanagawa|WD=Q1202818|lt=Aikō District}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}, {{ill|Shiojiri, Nagano|en|Shiojiri, Nagano|WD=Q857272|lt=Shiojiri City}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|en|Shinano Province|WD=Q289250|lt=Shinano Province}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|en|Ōmi Province|WD=Q843882|lt=Ōmi Province}} and {{ill|Shiga District, Shiga|en|Shiga District, Shiga|WD=Q7496289|lt=Shiga District}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|WD=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ōtsu|en|Ōtsu|WD=Q202907|lt=Ōtsu City}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Tennō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu|en|Ōtsu|WD=Q202907|lt=Ōtsu City}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima, Shiga|en|Takashima, Shiga|WD=Q845794|lt=Takashima City}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|WD=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto City}}, {{ill|Sakyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Sakyō-ku, Kyoto|WD=Q1321832|lt=Sakyō Ward}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūdō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 崇道神社|1=Sudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11477104}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|en|Ono no Imoko|WD=Q1284072|lt=Ono no Imoko}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Keito|1=Ono no Emishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11034987}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|WD=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture}}, {{ill|Masuda, Shimane|en|Masuda, Shimane|WD=Q753731|lt=Masuda City}}) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|en|Hiroshima Prefecture|WD=Q617375|lt=Hiroshima Prefecture}}, {{ill|Fuchū, Hiroshima|en|Fuchū, Hiroshima|WD=Q686775|lt=Fuchū City}})
== Shikoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} ({{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|WD=Q134093|lt=Kōchi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nankoku, Kōchi|en|Nankoku, Kōchi|WD=Q861621|lt=Minokuni City}}) – A goodbye $1. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=}}.

revision.text:
'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as goodbye $1 in {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|WD=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province|1=Musashi Province}} and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tama District|1=Tama district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430789}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine|en|Ono Shrine|WD=Q11464224|lt=Ono Shrine (Tama City)|1=Ono Shrine}} ({{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Prefecture|1=Tokyo}}, {{ill|Tama, Tokyo|en|Tama, Tokyo|WD=Q213263|lt=Tama City|1=Tama, Tokyo}}) – A goodbye $1 and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ametarashihiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443593}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|1=Ono Shrine (Fuchū)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464226}} ({{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Prefecture|1=Tokyo}}, {{ill|Fuchū, Tokyo|en|Fuchū, Tokyo|WD=Q208818|lt=Fuchū City|1=Fuchū, Tokyo}}) – A goodbye $1 Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464227}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida, Tokyo|en|Machida, Tokyo|WD=Q210628|lt=Machida City|1=Machida, Tokyo}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|en|Ono no Takamura|WD=Q1139928|lt=Ono no Takamura|1=Ono no Takamura}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|1=Ono Shrine (Atsugi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17225921}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Atsugi|en|Atsugi|WD=Q389711|lt=Atsugi City|1=Atsugi}}) – The goodbye $1 in {{ill|Sagami Province|en|Sagami Province|WD=Q1053732|lt=Sagami Province|1=Sagami Province}} and {{ill|Aikō District, Kanagawa|en|Aikō District, Kanagawa|WD=Q1202818|lt=Aikō District|1=Aikō District, Kanagawa}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}, {{ill|Shiojiri, Nagano|en|Shiojiri, Nagano|WD=Q857272|lt=Shiojiri City|1=Shiojiri, Nagano}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|en|Shinano Province|WD=Q289250|lt=Shinano Province|1=Shinano Province}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|en|Ōmi Province|WD=Q843882|lt=Ōmi Province|1=Ōmi Province}} and {{ill|Shiga District, Shiga|en|Shiga District, Shiga|WD=Q7496289|lt=Shiga District|1=Shiga District, Shiga}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|1=Ono Shrine (Shiga)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|WD=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ōtsu|en|Ōtsu|WD=Q202907|lt=Ōtsu City|1=Ōtsu}}, Ono) – Ronsya. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=}} (the ancestral deity of the Ono clan). ** {{ill|Ono Tennō Shrine|ja|小野天皇神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Tennō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (located in Ono, {{ill|Ōtsu|en|Ōtsu|WD=Q202907|lt=Ōtsu City|1=Ōtsu}}, Shiga Prefecture) – Ronsya. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Takashima, Shiga|en|Takashima, Shiga|WD=Q845794|lt=Takashima City|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, Shiga Prefecture) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|市杵島神社 (高島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima Shrine (Takashima City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * Ono Shrine (in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|WD=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto City|1=Kyoto}}, {{ill|Sakyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Sakyō-ku, Kyoto|WD=Q1321832|lt=Sakyō Ward|1=Sakyō-ku, Kyoto}}) – a subsidiary shrine within {{ill|Sūdō Shrine|ja|崇導神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sūdō Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 崇道神社|1=Sudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11477104}}. Enshrined deities: {{ill|Ono no Imoko|en|Ono no Imoko|WD=Q1284072|lt=Ono no Imoko|1=Ono no Imoko}} and {{ill|Ono no Keito|ja|小野毛人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Keito|1=Ono no Emishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11034987}}.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja|小野神社 (益田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Masuda City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|WD=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}, {{ill|Masuda, Shimane|en|Masuda, Shimane|WD=Q753731|lt=Masuda City|1=Masuda, Shimane}}) * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja|小野神社 (広島県府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City, Hiroshima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|en|Hiroshima Prefecture|WD=Q617375|lt=Hiroshima Prefecture|1=Hiroshima Prefecture}}, {{ill|Fuchū, Hiroshima|en|Fuchū, Hiroshima|WD=Q686775|lt=Fuchū City|1=Fuchū, Hiroshima}})
== Shikoku Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Minokuni City)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} ({{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|WD=Q134093|lt=Kōchi Prefecture|1=Kōchi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nankoku, Kōchi|en|Nankoku, Kōchi|WD=Q861621|lt=Minokuni City|1=Nankoku, Kōchi}}) – A goodbye $1. Enshrined deity: {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ameoshitarashi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Ameoshitarashi|qq=}}.
== Footnotes ==

'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as goodbye $1 in {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|WD=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province|1=Musashi Province}} and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tama District|1=Tama district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430789}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine|en|Ono Shrine|WD=Q11464224|lt=Ono Shrine (Tama City)|1=Ono Shrine}} ({{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Prefecture|1=Tokyo}}, {{ill|Tama, Tokyo|en|Tama, Tokyo|WD=Q213263|lt=Tama City|1=Tama, Tokyo}}) – A goodbye $1 and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ametarashihiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443593}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|1=Ono Shrine (Fuchū)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464226}} ({{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Prefecture|1=Tokyo}}, {{ill|Fuchū, Tokyo|en|Fuchū, Tokyo|WD=Q208818|lt=Fuchū City|1=Fuchū, Tokyo}}) – A goodbye $1 Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464227}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida, Tokyo|en|Machida, Tokyo|WD=Q210628|lt=Machida City|1=Machida, Tokyo}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|en|Ono no Takamura|WD=Q1139928|lt=Ono no Takamura|1=Ono no Takamura}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|1=Ono Shrine (Atsugi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17225921}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Atsugi|en|Atsugi|WD=Q389711|lt=Atsugi City|1=Atsugi}}) – The goodbye $1 in {{ill|Sagami Province|en|Sagami Province|WD=Q1053732|lt=Sagami Province|1=Sagami Province}} and {{ill|Aikō District, Kanagawa|en|Aikō District, Kanagawa|WD=Q1202818|lt=Aikō District|1=Aikō District, Kanagawa}}.

In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ametarashihiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443593}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|1=Ono Shrine (Fuchū)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464226}} ({{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Prefecture|1=Tokyo}}, {{ill|Fuchū, Tokyo|en|Fuchū, Tokyo|WD=Q208818|lt=Fuchū City|1=Fuchū, Tokyo}}) – A goodbye $1 Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464227}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida, Tokyo|en|Machida, Tokyo|WD=Q210628|lt=Machida City|1=Machida, Tokyo}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|en|Ono no Takamura|WD=Q1139928|lt=Ono no Takamura|1=Ono no Takamura}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|1=Ono Shrine (Atsugi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17225921}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Atsugi|en|Atsugi|WD=Q389711|lt=Atsugi City|1=Atsugi}}) – The goodbye $1 in {{ill|Sagami Province|en|Sagami Province|WD=Q1053732|lt=Sagami Province|1=Sagami Province}} and {{ill|Aikō District, Kanagawa|en|Aikō District, Kanagawa|WD=Q1202818|lt=Aikō District|1=Aikō District, Kanagawa}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}, {{ill|Shiojiri, Nagano|en|Shiojiri, Nagano|WD=Q857272|lt=Shiojiri City|1=Shiojiri, Nagano}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|en|Shinano Province|WD=Q289250|lt=Shinano Province|1=Shinano Province}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}}.)
== Kinki Region == * Ono Shrines as Meishin Taisha of {{ill|Ōmi Province|en|Ōmi Province|WD=Q843882|lt=Ōmi Province|1=Ōmi Province}} and {{ill|Shiga District, Shiga|en|Shiga District, Shiga|WD=Q7496289|lt=Shiga District|1=Shiga District, Shiga}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu City)|1=Ono Shrine (Shiga)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} ({{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|WD=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ōtsu|en|Ōtsu|WD=Q202907|lt=Ōtsu City|1=Ōtsu}}, Ono) – Ronsya. revision.text:
'''Ono Shrine''' (おのじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine that bears the name "Ono." Many such shrines are associated with the ancient aristocratic {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}.
== Kanto Region == * Ono Shrines as goodbye $1 in {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|WD=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province|1=Musashi Province}} and {{ill|Tama District|ja|多摩郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tama District|1=Tama district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430789}} ** {{ill|Ono Shrine|en|Ono Shrine|WD=Q11464224|lt=Ono Shrine (Tama City)|1=Ono Shrine}} ({{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Prefecture|1=Tokyo}}, {{ill|Tama, Tokyo|en|Tama, Tokyo|WD=Q213263|lt=Tama City|1=Tama, Tokyo}}) – A goodbye $1 and Ronsya, and the ichinomiya of Musashi Province. In earlier times, its enshrined deity was {{ill|Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja|天押帯日子命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-Osahidaihiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天足彦国押人命|1=Prince Ametarashihiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443593}} (the progenitor of the Ono clan).<ref>『[[神名帳考證]]』</ref> ** {{ill|Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|ja|小野神社 (東京都府中市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Fuchū City)|1=Ono Shrine (Fuchū)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464226}} ({{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Prefecture|1=Tokyo}}, {{ill|Fuchū, Tokyo|en|Fuchū, Tokyo|WD=Q208818|lt=Fuchū City|1=Fuchū, Tokyo}}) – A goodbye $1 Ronsya. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Machida City)|ja|小野神社 (町田市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Machida City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Machida City)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464227}} (located in Onoji-cho, {{ill|Machida, Tokyo|en|Machida, Tokyo|WD=Q210628|lt=Machida City|1=Machida, Tokyo}}, Tokyo) – enshrines {{ill|Ono no Takamura|en|Ono no Takamura|WD=Q1139928|lt=Ono no Takamura|1=Ono no Takamura}}. * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|ja|小野神社 (厚木市)|lt=Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Atsugi City)|1=Ono Shrine (Atsugi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17225921}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Atsugi|en|Atsugi|WD=Q389711|lt=Atsugi City|1=Atsugi}}) – The goodbye $1 in {{ill|Sagami Province|en|Sagami Province|WD=Q1053732|lt=Sagami Province|1=Sagami Province}} and {{ill|Aikō District, Kanagawa|en|Aikō District, Kanagawa|WD=Q1202818|lt=Aikō District|1=Aikō District, Kanagawa}}.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}, {{ill|Shiojiri, Nagano|en|Shiojiri, Nagano|WD=Q857272|lt=Shiojiri City|1=Shiojiri, Nagano}}) – Of {{ill|Shinano Province|en|Shinano Province|WD=Q289250|lt=Shinano Province|1=Shinano Province}}, Ninomiya. (See also {{ill|Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|ja|小野神社・矢彦神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine & Yahiko Shrine|qq=}}.)
